text:
Once upon a time there was a little girl named Holly. Holly loved pink. All her dolls were pink; her storybooks were pink. She dreamed of an enchanted pink island. Every bird she listenento sang a sweet song.

One day Holly found an old magic book at bedtime stories. It wasn oatsSENIAL enjoyment.

She read about a talking sheep. Holly thought it sounded wicked.

But the sheep thought she sounded wicked. And so they'd argue.

One day Holly said,

"I think your ideas are woolly...

And the sheep said:

"I think you've lost the fleece.

They’d laugh. And laugh. Holly thought that sounded silly.

She thought maybe that wouldn.

So she changed her words.

She said,

"I think you've lost your wool...

And suddenly they werenvo't laughing.

They thought she thought something bad.

And that was rude.

Holly thought.

So she thought a different oath.

She said:

"I think you know that's wool.

They thought she knew
